name: Mango Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 lemon, juice of 1 tsp olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the mango very finely.
2. Dice the jalapeno pepper and fresh coriander very finely.
3. Combine the diced mango, jalapeno, and coriander in a bowl.
4. Add lime juice and olive oil to the mixture.
5. Serve the salsa with a generous dollop of sour cream and another generous dollop on top of the sour cream.
